title: acer grosseri var. forrestii
intro: Acer grosseri var. forrestii, also known as Forrest's Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, it is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Forrest's Maple is often combined with other herbs and used in traditional Chinese medicine to create teas, infusions, and tonics.
